items.title: Health Insurance Market to Reach USD 3.6 Billion by 2031 Amid Rising Healthcare Costs and Expanding Digital Distribution | By DataM Intelligence
items.description: According to DataM Intelligence, "The Health Insurance Market Size reached USD 2.2 billion in 2022 and is projected to rise to USD 3.6 billion by 2031, growing at a CAGR of 6.4% during the forecast period 2024–2031." The Health Insurance Market is expanding steadily, driven by the rising burden of chronic diseases, growing healthcare costs, and increasing demand for comprehensive coverage across emerging and developed economies.
